vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành tính cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was enrolled in a local art workshop where I learned the basics of sketching.

vocab.meaning: khai phá/giải phóng sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Painting was the only outlet that truly allowed me to unleash my creativity as a child.
Drawing was merely a recreational activity back then, rather than something I pursued professionally.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Learning to draw early on significantly enhanced my spatial awareness and attention to detail.
I had a fleeting interest in oil painting when I was ten, but I soon shifted my focus to music.

vocab.meaning: khả năng/phong cách nghệ thuật thiên bẩm
vocab.example: My teacher noticed I had a bit of an artistic flair when I produced a realistic portrait of my pet.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh hóa các khái niệm
vocab.example: Art classes taught me how to visualize concepts, which eventually helped me in my science projects.

vocab.meaning: vẽ nguệch ngoạc không mục đích
vocab.example: I used to doodle aimlessly in the margins of my notebooks instead of paying attention to the lectures.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: The school provided plenty of hands-on experience with different mediums, from charcoal to acrylics.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sinh động
vocab.example: Being encouraged to paint helped me maintain a vivid imagination throughout my upbringing.
